mapper.select: SELECT id, group_id, name, alias, is_active, created_at FROM players WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, group_id, name, alias, is_active, created_at FROM players WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND is_active = TRUE ORDER BY name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO players (group_id, name, alias, is_active) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{name}, #{alias}, TRUE)
mapper.update: UPDATE players SET is_active = FALSE WHERE id = #{id}
